name: browser-takeover
description: Attach Codex agents to already-open authenticated Chromium tabs through an extension bridge, or to debuggable browsers through CDP.

interface.shortDescription: Control already-open Chrome or Edge tabs through a local bridge.
interface.longDescription: Browser Takeover helps Codex agents work with already-open authenticated Chrome and Edge tabs through a companion extension and localhost bridge. It can also discover local Chromium browsers, connect to DevTools Protocol sessions, inspect tabs, navigate pages, evaluate JavaScript, capture screenshots, and launch a persistent takeover profile when needed.
defaultPrompt: List already-open tabs from my normal browser.
Control the logged-in page I already have open.
Check whether my browser is attachable.
